weather_report:
Night settles over Subiaco beneath a clean, lacquered sky. The day has closed out cloudless, lending the air a crisp clarity; stars prick the darkness and edges look a little sharper than usual. It feels calm and unhurried, the kind of evening that invites a slower step and a deeper breath.

The forecast keeps the heavens clear into the small hours, so expect a dry, transparent night with no surprises. Sunshine should return unfiltered after dawn if this pattern holds; the UV is essentially asleep now but will wake briskly with the morning, so plan a hat or sunscreen if you’ll be out early. Light layers suit the late-night cool—think a soft jumper over a tee, with something slightly warmer if you linger outside. Given the calm, a gentle lap around the block, watering the herbs, or sitting by an open window to air the room all fit the mood; if you’re winding down, set out tomorrow’s bag and let the quiet do its work.
